_comment: Machine-readable mirror of the IAMRoleWriteBounded SCP in terraform/bootstrap/github_ci_apply.tf. v2 (Decision 144 / T2.48): the managed-role set moves from the two enumerated roles to the boundary-carrying agent-platform-* PREFIX (in_budget_managed_role_prefix), extending Decision 129's per-service agent-platform-* read prefix to writes; in_budget_actions gains 'create' (creating a NEW inline policy/attachment on a boundary-carrying agent-platform-* role auto-applies, was update-only). apply_role_self_exclusion carves the apply role's own name out of the widened prefix (the prefix would otherwise match agent-platform-github-ci-apply itself) -- the guard-side counterpart to the DenySelfInlinePolicyWrite carve-out in github_ci_apply.tf (T2.23 self-grant break). Role name / prefix only, no ARNs (Decision 101 / public-repo boundary). Amend ONLY via the bootstrap tier (Decision 92 point 5 ratchet rule).
